---
title: "Dieter Rams: Ten Principles for Good Design"
description: "\"Good design is as little design as possible.\""
author: "synesis"
date: "2023-11-04"
categories: [links, video]
image: cover.jpg
---

![[Watch on YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wChkvofR7Q0)](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

"Good design

is innovative.
makes a product useful.
is aesthetic.
makes a product understandable.
is unobtrusive.
is honest.
is long-lasting.
is thorough down to the last detail.
is environmentally-friendly.
is as little design as possible."

(by Dieter Rams)

[[1]](#ref-1)

*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_design-activity-7126358894582321152-JPoY).*

---

## References

<a id="ref-1"></a>[1] Dieter Rams — Ten Principles for Good Design (video). <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wChkvofR7Q0>
